task_objective: Update Ludusavi shortcut artwork per the new update spec: replace portrait and hero images, preserve wide capsule, and remove the logo overlay.
tests_added: tests/test_package_plugin.py no logo asset in packaged dist
design_decisions: Removed logo.png and all logo positioning logic from the shortcut artwork flow.
Kept grid_l.png unchanged while replacing grid_p.png and hero.png with the update-spec SteamGridDB PNG sources.
Preserved direct SetCustomArtworkForApp usage and backend-routed artwork logging.
results: Focused artwork and package tests passed after rebuilding the frontend bundle without the stale logo asset.
